title: Programmers Assert Ownership Over AI-Generated Code
text:
Opinionautomatic programmingprogramming assistanceredisauthorship
Programmers Assert Ownership Over AI-Generated Code
antirez.com
|6.1
Relevance ScoreIn a recent blog post, Redis creator antirez argues that "automatic programming"—the practice of producing software with active AI assistance—is distinct from passive "vibe coding" and results in code that remains the programmer's intellectual product. He emphasizes human vision, design, and continuous steering as the determinants of quality and ownership, framing automatic programming as a democratizing yet author-preserving approach.
